title: Repository Structure — Schema Index
description: Pointer to the four canonical schemas that define the usebrick.dev Repository Structure Platform. Every tool in the platform — slopbrick, stackpick, gir, the MCP server, future CI integrations — reads and writes data matching these schemas.

health.description: Repository health snapshot from a single scan. v5 (v0.21.0): four orthogonal scores — aiSlopScore (now RAW amount: 0=clean, 100=saturated, higher=worse; flipped from v0.20.1 inversion), engineeringHygiene, security, repositoryHealth (each 0-100, higher is better, with composite inverting aiSlopScore at the call site) — plus issue counts. Legacy slopIndex/categoryScores kept optional for backward compat with v0.14–0.20.1 readers. The v0.20.1 aiQuality alias is REMOVED in v5 (semantics now differ: old aiQuality: 70 = 70 cleaner, new aiSlopScore: 70 = 70% slop).

structure.description: Agent-readable markdown summary (rendered from inventory + constitution).
